squads.name: Rift Walkers
squads.description: The default starting squad with balanced, straightforward mechs.

weapon.name: Titan Fist
weapon.targeting: Punch an adjacent tile, damaging and pushing it.
weapon.description: Punches an adjacent tile, dealing damage and pushing the target.

upgrades.name: Dash
upgrades.effect: Charge any distance before punching the target.

weapon.name: Taurus Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fires a powerful projectile that damages and pushes its target.
weapon.description: Shoots a pushing projectile that deals damage and pushes the target backward.

weapon.name: Artemis Artillery
weapon.targeting: Powerful artillery strike, damaging a single tile and pushing adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Artillery shot that damages target and pushes all adjacent tiles.

upgrades.name: Buildings Immune
upgrades.effect: This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

squads.name: Rusting Hulks
squads.description: Smoke-based squad. Jet Mech creates smoke, Storm Generator damages enemies in smoke.

weapon.name: Aerial Bombs
weapon.targeting: Fly over a target, dropping an explosive smoke bomb.
weapon.description: Flies to target tile, damaging and smoking the tile you fly over.

upgrades.name: +1 Range
upgrades.effect: Allows jumping over and attacking an additional target.

weapon.name: Rocket Artillery
weapon.targeting: Fires a pushing artillery and creates Smoke behind the shooter.
weapon.description: Fires a rocket that damages and pushes target and creates a smoke cloud behind the shooter.

passive.name: Storm Generator
passive.effect: All Smoke deals damage to enemy units every turn.
passive.description: Passive ability that damages all enemies standing in smoke tiles.

weapon.name: Repulse
weapon.targeting: Push all adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Pushes all adjacent tiles away from the mech.

upgrades.name: Shield Self
upgrades.effect: Creates a personal Shield when used.

squads.name: Zenith Guard
squads.description: Laser/shield squad. High damage laser, charge attack, and shield/pull support.

weapon.name: Burst Beam
weapon.targeting: Fire a piercing beam that decreases in damage the further it goes.
weapon.description: Fires a piercing laser that hits all units in a line. Damage decreases with range (3-2-1).

upgrades.name: Ally Immune
upgrades.effect: Friendly units will not take damage from this attack.

weapon.name: Ramming Engines
weapon.targeting: Fly in a line and slam into the target, pushing it and hurting yourself.
weapon.description: Dashes forward, damaging target and pushing it. Takes 1 self-damage on hit.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage Each
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to self and target by 1.

weapons.name: Attraction Pulse
weapons.description: Pulls a target unit toward the mech. Can kill enemies by pulling them into the mech.

weapons.name: Shield Projector
weapons.targeting: Shield tiles from damage. (2 uses per battle.)
weapons.description: Shields tiles from damage. Has limited uses per battle.

squads.name: Blitzkrieg
squads.description: Lightning chain and crowd control. Chains damage between adjacent units, grapples, and places boulders.

weapon.name: Electric Whip
weapon.targeting: Chain damage through adjacent targets.
weapon.description: Electric attack that chains through all adjacent connected units.

upgrades.name: Building Chain
upgrades.effect: Chain through Grid Buildings without causing damage.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Deals +1 damage to all affected tiles.

weapon.name: Grappling Hook
weapon.targeting: Use a grapple to pull Mech towards objects, or units to the Mech.
weapon.description: Pulls a target to a tile adjacent to the mech, or pulls mech towards immovable objects.

upgrades.name: Shield Ally
upgrades.effect: If used on an ally unit it gives them a Shield.

weapon.name: Rock Accelerator
weapon.targeting: Launch a rock at a tile, pushing adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Throws a boulder that deals damage and creates a persistent rock on the tile.

squads.name: Steel Judoka
squads.description: Displacement squad. Throws, pushes, and pulls enemies into each other's attack lines.

weapon.name: Vice Fist
weapon.targeting: Grab a unit and toss it behind you.
weapon.description: Throws an adjacent enemy to the opposite side of the mech.

weapon.name: Cluster Artillery
weapon.targeting: Protect a tile by damaging and pushing adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Artillery that damages and pushes a cross-shaped area around the target (not the center tile).

upgrades.name: Buildings Immune
upgrades.effect: This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to adjacent tiles by 1.

weapon.name: Grav Well
weapon.targeting: Artillery weapon that pulls its target towards you.
weapon.description: Pulls target unit towards the Gravity Mech. Can pull enemies into water/chasms or into each other.

passive.name: Vek Hormones
passive.effect: Enemies do +1 Damage against other enemies.
passive.description: Passive that increases all enemy damage against other enemies by 1.

squads.name: Flame Behemoths
squads.description: Fire-based squad. Sets tiles and enemies on fire for damage over time.

weapon.name: Flame Thrower
weapon.damage_note: 0 base, 2 damage to targets already on fire
weapon.targeting: Push target tile and light tiles on Fire. Damage units already on Fire.
weapon.description: Sets target tiles on fire and pushes. Deals 2 damage to already-burning targets.

passive.name: Flame Shielding
passive.effect: All Mechs are immune to Fire.
passive.description: Passive that makes all mechs immune to fire damage.

weapon.name: Vulcan Artillery
weapon.targeting: Light the target on Fire and push adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Artillery that lights target on fire and pushes surrounding tiles. No direct damage at base.

upgrades.name: Backburn
upgrades.effect: Light the tile behind the Mech on Fire.

weapon.name: Teleporter
weapon.targeting: Swap places with a nearby tile.
weapon.description: Teleports target unit, swapping its position with the mech.

upgrades.name: +1 Range
upgrades.effect: Extends range of the swap by 1 tile.

upgrades.name: +2 Range
upgrades.effect: Extends range of the swap by 2 tiles.

squads.name: Frozen Titans
squads.description: Ice-based squad. Freezes enemies and redirects attacks with dual-directional cannon.

weapon.name: Spartan Shield
weapon.targeting: Bash the enemy, flipping its attack direction.
weapon.description: Melee attack that damages and flips the enemy's attack direction.

weapon.name: Janus Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fire two projectiles in opposite directions.
weapon.description: Shoots in two opposite directions, hitting targets in both lines.

weapon.name: Cryo-Launcher
weapon.targeting: Freeze yourself and the target.
weapon.description: Fires a cryo projectile that freezes the target. Also freezes the Ice Mech.

squads.name: Hazardous Mechs
squads.description: Self-damaging squad with high damage output and healing mechanics.

weapon.name: Hydraulic Legs
weapon.targeting: Leap to a tile, damaging self and adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Jumps to a tile, dealing damage to all adjacent tiles. Takes 1 self-damage.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage Each
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to self and targets by 1.

weapon.name: Unstable Cannon
weapon.targeting: Powerful projectile that causes damage to shooter as well as target.
weapon.description: High-damage cannon that damages self when firing. Pushes self backward.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage Each
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to self and target by 1.

weapon.name: A.C.I.D. Projector
weapon.targeting: Fire a projectile that applies A.C.I.D. and pushes.
weapon.description: Fires a projectile that applies A.C.I.D. status to the target and pushes it.

passive.name: Viscera Nanobots
passive.effect: Mechs heal 1 damage when they deal a killing blow.
passive.description: Passive: Mechs recover health from killing enemies.

squads.name: Bombermechs
squads.description: AE squad. Spawns explosive bomblings that detonate on Vek. Pierce Mech shoots through units.

weapon.name: AP Cannon
weapon.targeting: Fire a pushing projectile that pierces the first target and damages the second.
weapon.description: Fires a pushing projectile that pierces through the first target and damages the second.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to the second hit tile by 1.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to the second hit tile by 1.

weapon.name: Bomb Dispenser
weapon.targeting: Launch a Walking Bomb. Unused bombs dismantle after the enemy turn.
weapon.description: Spawns a Walking Bomb that autonomously moves toward and detonates on enemies.

upgrades.name: 2 Bombs
upgrades.effect: Fire a second Walking Bomb in a different direction.

weapon.name: Force Swap
weapon.targeting: Force a nearby unit to swap places with any other unit.
weapon.description: Swaps positions of two target units anywhere on the battlefield.

upgrades.name: Heal Ally
upgrades.effect: Swapping an ally will heal it completely.

upgrades.name: Hurt Enemy
upgrades.effect: Swapping an enemy will deal 1 damage to it.

squads.name: Arachnophiles
squads.description: AE squad. Creates allied Arachnoid units from killed Vek. Ricochet rocket and area slide.

weapon.name: Ricochet Rocket
weapon.targeting: Bounce a projectile off one target to hit another (pushes each target).
weapon.description: Rocket that bounces off first target and continues hitting the second, pushing both.

upgrades.name: Ally Immune
upgrades.effect: Friendly Units will not take damage from this attack.

weapon.name: Arachnoid Injector
weapon.targeting: Damage target, creating a friendly robot spider on kill.
weapon.description: Kills create allied Arachnoid units that damage and push enemies.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases the artillery attack damage by 1.

upgrades.name: Acidic
upgrades.effect: Adds Acid to the attack of the Arachnoid.

weapon.name: Area Shift
weapon.targeting: Push self and all adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Slides the mech and all adjacent units one tile in the same direction.

upgrades.name: Shield Ally
upgrades.effect: Shield any Ally units affected by this skill.

squads.name: Mist Eaters
squads.description: AE squad. Heals from smoke/clouds. Control Shot repositions enemies, Reverse Thrusters dash-damages.

weapon.name: Reverse Thrusters
weapon.damage_note: 1 self, 1-2 damage (increases with distance, starts with 2-tile range)
weapon.targeting: Smoke and deal damage to a tile while dashing away. Damage increases the further the Mech dashes away.
weapon.description: Dashes away from target tile, dealing damage to it and creating smoke. Damage scales with distance.

upgrades.name: +1 Range
upgrades.effect: Increases the max distance and damage by 1.

upgrades.name: +1 Range
upgrades.effect: Increases the max distance and damage by 1.

weapon.name: Smoldering Shells
weapon.targeting: Damage and apply Fire to a tile while adding Smoke to adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Artillery that damages and sets target on fire, with smoke on adjacent tiles.

upgrades.name: +2 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases the center tile damage by 2.

passive.name: Nanofilter Mending
passive.effect: Standing on Smoke repairs Mechs and removes Smoke.
passive.description: Squad passive: mechs recover health from smoke, which is consumed in the process.

weapon.name: Control Shot
weapon.targeting: Temporarily control a unit, moving it a short distance. (Starts with 2-tile distance)
weapon.description: Forces target to walk in a specified direction. Versatile repositioning.

upgrades.name: +1 Move
upgrades.effect: Targeted unit can move one extra tile.

upgrades.name: +1 Move
upgrades.effect: Targeted unit can move one extra tile.

squads.name: Heat Sinkers
squads.description: AE squad. Uses fire and Boost mechanic. Mechs gain Boost from fire tiles for +1 damage.

weapon.name: Thermal Discharger
weapon.targeting: Damage one or more tiles in a line and push away adjacent tiles. (Starts with 2-tile range)
weapon.description: Damages tiles in a line and pushes targets on adjacent perpendicular tiles away.

upgrades.name: Add Fire
upgrades.effect: Adds Fire to all hit tiles.

weapon.name: Quick-Fire Rockets
weapon.targeting: Fire two projectiles in different directions.
weapon.description: Fires two rockets in different chosen directions, hitting targets in each line.

weapon.name: Firestorm Generator
weapon.targeting: Flaming artillery that drops fire on the way to its target. (Starts with 2-tile range)
weapon.description: Creates a line of fire tiles to the target, pushing the last target away.

passive.name: Heat Engines
passive.effect: Standing on Fire removes Fire and gives the Mech "Boost".
passive.description: Passive: Mechs consume fire tiles for a Boost status, gaining +1 damage on their next attack.

squads.name: Cataclysm
squads.description: AE squad. Creates pits/chasms, destroys terrain. Pitcher throws enemies, Drill creates cracks, Triptych pushes and damages in a line.

weapon.name: Hydraulic Lifter
weapon.targeting: Throw an adjacent unit and damage it. (Starts with 2-tile range)
weapon.description: Picks up and throws adjacent unit, dealing damage on landing.

upgrades.name: +2 Range
upgrades.effect: Increases the range of the throw by 2.

upgrades.name: +2 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases damage to the target by 2.

weapon.name: Tri-Rocket
weapon.targeting: Damage and push 3 tiles in a line.
weapon.description: Fires rockets that damage and push 3 tiles in a straight line.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Deals 1 additional damage to all targets.

upgrades.name: Building Immune
upgrades.effect: This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.

weapon.name: Seismic Capacitor
weapon.targeting: Damage and flip target. If target is killed, crack adjacent tiles.
weapon.description: Melee attack that damages and flips the target. Cracks adjacent tiles when killing the target.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increase damage to the target by 1.

upgrades.name: +1 Damage
upgrades.effect: Increase damage to the target by 1.

squads.name: Secret Squad
squads.unlock: Unlock all 8 named squads, then purchase for 25 coins
squads.description: Secret squad with Cyborg-class mechs based on Vek. Unique Cyborg pilots that cannot be swapped.

weapon.name: Ramming Speed
weapon.targeting: Dash across the map, damaging and pushing the target tile.
weapon.description: Dash attack that damages and pushes the target.

weapon.name: Needle Shot
weapon.targeting: Throw needles at the enemy, pushing the furthest hit tile. (Starts with 1-tile range.)
weapon.description: Ranged needle attack that pushes the furthest target. Range and damage increase with upgrades.

upgrades.name: Range & Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases potential hit tiles by 1 and damage on all tiles by 1.

upgrades.name: Range & Damage
upgrades.effect: Increases potential hit tiles by 1 and damage on all tiles by 1.

weapon.name: Explosive Goo
weapon.targeting: Artillery attack that damages a tile and pushes adjacent tiles away.
weapon.description: Artillery attack that damages target and pushes adjacent tiles.

mech_classes.Prime: Close-range fighters. Can use Prime-class weapons without power penalty.
mech_classes.Brute: Durable fighters with charge/push mechanics. Can use Brute-class weapons without penalty.
mech_classes.Ranged: Artillery and ranged attackers. Can use Ranged-class weapons without penalty.
mech_classes.Science: Support mechs with utility abilities. Can use Science-class weapons without penalty.
mech_classes.Cyborg: Unique class for Secret Squad mechs. All non-Cyborg weapons cost +1 reactor core.

class_weapon_penalty: Using a weapon from a different class costs +1 reactor core.

notes.reactor_cores: Each mech can install up to 9 reactor cores. Cores power weapons, upgrades, and passives.
notes.mech_repair: Any mech can repair for 1 HP instead of attacking. Removes Fire, Frozen, A.C.I.D.
notes.custom_squads: Players can mix any 3 unlocked mechs into a custom squad.
notes.weapon_swapping: Found weapons can replace starting weapons. Class matters for power cost.
notes.cyborg_pilots: Cyborg Pilots cannot be swapped out. They lose 25 XP instead of dying.
